SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF SILVYA SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
